CustomField.description: The model identifier as returned by the LLM provider (e.g., gpt-4o, gpt-4o-mini, gpt-5-nano)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Exact model name string returned in the LLM API response. Must match precisely for cost tracking to work. Examples: gpt-4o, gpt-4o-mini, claude-3-5-sonnet-20241022.
CustomField.label: Model Identifier
